get.description: The active planning backend and the active provider's runtime allowlist (frontend data model §Optimizer plans, key ["optimizer-model"]) — backs the ModelSelector. Polled. Open to anyone — reads need no token (anonymous-viewer posture, platform security §4).

post.description: Switch the active planning model within the active provider's allowlist (operator only, slice 3). Takes effect on the next cycle; the provider cannot be changed here (an offline change). A model not in available_models is rejected 400.

200.description: The model state after the switch (effective next cycle).
